title: Audit Sync Cleanup

transitions.note: Created after the repo audit to fix stale docs, duplicate root draft files, document-map drift, and roadmap draft placement without changing production secrets.
User approved the >5 file Stop Signal and requested all feasible audit fixes.
Docs/state sync, typecheck, lint, tests, build, model verification, production health/models smoke, audit, and diff check passed. Task remains verify until commitHash exists.
Expanded scope to support Vercel Marketplace Upstash aliases KV_REST_API_URL and KV_REST_API_TOKEN before attempting production activation.

Alias support and docs/task sync are complete. rate-limit targeted tests, env-check tests, sync dry-run, state:check, docs:check, typecheck, lint, verify/build, full tests, models:verify, npm audit, production health/models smoke, and diff check passed. Task remains verify until commitHash exists.
Resolved historical audit references to the removed models.ts verification comment so TODO debt search no longer reports a stale code item.

notes: Scope: synchronize Team Mode and Image Arena docs with current runtime behavior; move v2.1-v3.1 roadmap drafts and project vision out of the repository root; register SECURITY.md, ADRs, and roadmap drafts in document-map; resolve stale audit references to removed models.ts debt; support Vercel Marketplace Upstash KV_REST_API_URL/KV_REST_API_TOKEN aliases; keep V200-02 open for production env activation because Upstash/Vercel secret values or Marketplace resource acceptance are external and cannot be invented.
